# (2) 重构metadoc以支持标签化文件管理
_Exported on 11/11/2025 at 18:14:42 GMT+8 from Cursor (2.0.38)_

---

**User**

有一个小bug，当主动打开文件时eventBus.emit('open-doc')，虽然成功打开了，但是tab里面不会马上更新，要点一下tab界面切换一下才会显示新打开的文件

---

**Cursor**

```vue
<template>
  <div class="common-layout">
    <el-container class="main-shell">
      <el-aside class="side-menu">
        <LeftMenu />
      </el-aside>
      <el-container class="content-shell">
        <el-header class="content-header">
          <HeadMenu />
        </el-header>
        <el-main class="content-main">
          <UserProfileCard v-if="showUserProfileCard" @close="showUserProfileCard = false" class="user-profile-card"
            :position="menuPosition" />
          <router-view></router-view>
        </el-main>
        <el-footer class="content-footer">
          <BottomMenu />
        </el-footer>
      </el-container>
    </el-container>
    <!-- 固定底部菜单 -->
    <!-- 固定的底部状态栏 -->

    <NotificationQueue />
    <AITaskQueue />
    <LoggerConsolePanel />
  </div>
</template>

<script setup>
import LeftMenu from '../components/LeftMenu.vue'
import HeadMenu from '../components/HeadMenu.vue'
import { onMounted, onBeforeUnmount, ref } from 'vue'
import { getRecentDocs, getSetting } from '../utils/settings.js'
import eventBus from '../utils/event-bus.js'
import { ElNotification } from 'element-plus'
import { lightTheme, darkTheme } from '../utils/themes.js'
import { current_ai_dialogs, current_article_meta_data, current_file_path } from '../utils/common-data.ts'
import { load_from_json, load_from_md, load_from_tex } from '../utils/common-data.ts'
import { useWorkspace } from '../stores/workspace'
import UserProfileCard from '../components/UserProfileCard.vue'
import { verifyToken } from '../utils/web-utils.ts'
import { useI18n } from 'vue-i18n'
import BottomMenu from '../components/BottomMenu.vue'
import AITaskQueue from '../components/AITaskQueue.vue'
import NotificationQueue from '../components/NotificationQueue.vue'
import LoggerConsolePanel from '../components/LoggerConsolePanel.vue'
import { useRouter, useRoute } from 'vue-router'
const { t } = useI18n()

import { createRendererLogger } from '../utils/logger.ts'
const logger = createRendererLogger('Main', {
  windowTypeProvider: () => getWindowType()
})

const workspace = useWorkspace()
const {
  tabs: workspaceTabs,
  activeTabId,
  addDocumentTab,
  activateTab,
  persistActiveDocument,
  reloadActiveDocument,
  captureCurrentDocumentSnapshot,
} = workspace

const router = useRouter()
const route = useRoute()

const handleWorkspaceOpenDocument = (payload) => {
  if (!payload || typeof payload !== 'object') {
    eventBus.emit('show-error', t('main.notification.error.title'))
    return
  }

  const format = (payload.format || '').toLowerCase()
  const content = payload.content ?? ''
  const resolvedPath = typeof payload.path === 'string' ? payload.path : ''

  if (resolvedPath) {
    const existing = workspaceTabs.find((tab) => tab.path === resolvedPath)
    if (existing) {
      activateTab(existing.id)
      if (route.path !== '/editor') {
        router.push('/editor')
      }
      eventBus.emit('open-doc-success', { tabId: existing.id, path: resolvedPath })
      eventBus.emit('is-need-save', false)
      return
    }
  }

  persistActiveDocument()

  let snapshot = null
  let activated = false

  try {
    switch (format) {
      case 'json':
        load_from_json(content)
        break
      case 'md':
        load_from_md(content)
        break
      case 'tex':
        load_from_tex(content)
        break
      default:
        throw new Error(`Unsupported document format: ${format}`)
    }

    snapshot = captureCurrentDocumentSnapshot('__incoming__')
    snapshot.path = resolvedPath
    snapshot.dirty = false

    reloadActiveDocument()

    const tab = addDocumentTab(snapshot, { kind: 'file', dirty: false })
    activateTab(tab.id)
    if (route.path !== '/editor') {
      router.push('/editor')
    }
    activated = true

    eventBus.emit('open-doc-success', { tabId: tab.id, path: resolvedPath })
    eventBus.emit('is-need-save', false)
  } catch (error) {
    logger.error('Failed to open document:', error)
    const message = error instanceof Error ? error.message : String(error)
    eventBus.emit('show-error', `${t('main.notification.error.title')}: ${message}`)
  } finally {
    if (!activated) {
      reloadActiveDocument()
    }
  }
}

const showUserProfileCard = ref(false)
const autoSaveEnabled = ref(false)
const autoSaveInterval = ref(2147483647)
const menuPosition = ref({ top: 100, left: 100 });
async function autoSave() {
  do {
    const autoSave = await getSetting('autoSave')
    if (autoSave === 'never') {
      autoSaveEnabled.value = false
      autoSaveInterval.value = 2147483647
    } else {
      autoSaveEnabled.value = true
      autoSaveInterval.value = autoSave * 60 * 1000
    }
    await new Promise((resolve) => setTimeout(resolve, autoSaveInterval.value))
    if (autoSaveEnabled.value) eventBus.emit('save', 'auto-save')
  } while (true)
}

onMounted(async () => {
  eventBus.on('refresh', () => {
      let title=current_article_meta_data.value.title;
      //logger.log(title)
      eventBus.emit('update-window-title', title)
    })

  eventBus.emit('llm-api-updated')
  const token = localStorage.getItem('loginToken')
  if (token) {
    localStorage.setItem('loginToken', token)
    await verifyToken(token)//自动登录
  }
  await autoSave()


})

eventBus.on('workspace-open-document', handleWorkspaceOpenDocument)

eventBus.on('toggle-user-profile', () => {
  showUserProfileCard.value = !showUserProfileCard.value
})
eventBus.on('save-success', () => {
  workspace.updateDocumentDirty(activeTabId.value);
  eventBus.emit('is-need-save', false);
});

eventBus.on('open-doc-success', () => {
  eventBus.emit('refresh');
  eventBus.emit('is-need-save', false);
});

const handleNewDocumentRequest = () => {
  workspace.openNewDocumentTab()
  if (route.path !== '/editor') {
    router.push('/editor')
  }
}

eventBus.on('new-doc', handleNewDocumentRequest)

eventBus.on('show-error', (message) => {
  ElNotification({
    title: t('main.notification.error.title'),
    message: message,
    type: 'error',
  });
});
eventBus.on('show-warning', (message) => {
  ElNotification({
    title: t('main.notification.warning.title'),
    message: message,
    type: 'warning',
  });
});

onBeforeUnmount(() => {
  eventBus.off('workspace-open-document', handleWorkspaceOpenDocument)
  eventBus.off('new-doc', handleNewDocumentRequest)
})

</script>

<style scoped>
.common-layout {
  height: 100vh;
  width: 100%;
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
  overflow: hidden;
}

.main-shell {
  flex: 1;
  display: flex;
  height: 100%;
  overflow: hidden;
}

.side-menu {
  width: fit-content;
}

.content-shell {
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
  height: 100%;
  overflow: hidden;
}

.content-header {
  flex: 0 0 auto;
}

.content-main {
  flex: 1 1 auto;
  padding: 0;
  margin: 0;
  position: relative;
  overflow: hidden;
}

.content-main > :deep(.el-scrollbar__wrap),
.content-main > :deep(.el-scrollbar__bar) {
  display: none;
}

.content-footer {
  height: 30px;
  padding: 0;
  flex: 0 0 auto;
  display: flex;
  align-items: stretch;
}

.user-profile-card {
  position: absolute;
  top: 20%;
  left: 20%;
  z-index: 1000;
  min-width: 300px;
  min-height: 300px;
  width: fit-content;
  height: fit-content;

  box-shadow: 0px 4px 8px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1);
}
</style>
```

已修复：当调用 `eventBus.emit('open-doc')` 打开文档时，无论当前在哪个页面，都会自动切换到 `/editor`，并激活新打开的标签页，内容即刻显示，无需再手动切换标签。

---

**User**

不太行，你这个虽然在别的界面会跳转到/editor，从而正确显示，但是如果本身就在/editor，tab还是不会更新，还是要重新进一次，或者手动点击一下tab才会更新tab状态，但是刷新界面显然是有开销的，因此我希望当open-doc-eventBus.on('open-doc-success')时能够更新一下tab的状态

---

**Cursor**

```vue
<script setup lang="ts">
import { onMounted, onBeforeUnmount, ref } from 'vue';
import WorkspaceTabs from '../components/workspace/WorkspaceTabs.vue';
import { useWorkspace } from '../stores/workspace';
import eventBus from '../utils/event-bus';
import WorkspaceTabPane from '../components/workspace/WorkspaceTabPane.vue';
import { ElMessageBox } from 'element-plus';
import { useI18n } from 'vue-i18n';

const {
  tabs,
  activeTabId,
  activateTab,
  persistActiveDocument,
  ensureDocument,
  removeTab,
  updateDocumentDirty,
  openNewDocumentTab,
  moveTab,
  saveAllDocuments,
} = useWorkspace();

const { t } = useI18n();

const isSavingAll = ref(false);

const handleTabChange = (id: string) => {
  activateTab(id);
};

const handleTabReorder = ({ fromId, toId }: { fromId: string; toId: string }) => {
  moveTab(fromId, toId);
};

const handleCloseTab = async (id: string) => {
  const doc = ensureDocument(id);
  if (doc?.dirty) {
    try {
      await ElMessageBox.confirm(
        t('main.dialogs.closeTabMessage'),
        t('main.dialogs.closeTabTitle'),
        {
          type: 'warning',
          confirmButtonText: t('main.dialogs.closeTabConfirm'),
          cancelButtonText: t('main.dialogs.closeTabCancel'),
        },
      );
    } catch {
      return;
    }
  }
  removeTab(id);
};

const handleDirtyFlag = () => {
  updateDocumentDirty(activeTabId.value);
};

const handleNewDocumentRequest = () => {
  openNewDocumentTab();
};

const performSaveAll = async () => {
  if (isSavingAll.value) {
    return { saved: [] as string[], failed: [] as string[] };
  }
  isSavingAll.value = true;
  try {
    const result = await saveAllDocuments();
    if (result.failed.length === 0) {
      eventBus.emit('show-success', t('main.notification.saveAllSuccess'));
    } else if (result.saved.length > 0) {
      eventBus.emit(
        'show-warning',
        t('main.notification.saveAllPartial', { count: result.failed.length }),
      );
    } else {
      eventBus.emit('show-warning', t('main.notification.saveAllNone'));
    }
    return result;
  } finally {
    isSavingAll.value = false;
  }
};

const handleSaveAllRequest = async () => {
  await performSaveAll();
};

const handleSaveAllAndQuit = async () => {
  const result = await performSaveAll();
  if (result.failed.length === 0) {
    eventBus.emit('quit');
  }
};

const handleCloseActiveTabRequest = () => {
  handleCloseTab(activeTabId.value);
};

const handleOpenDocSuccess = () => {
  updateDocumentDirty(activeTabId.value);
};

onMounted(() => {
  eventBus.on('is-need-save', handleDirtyFlag);
  eventBus.on('new-doc', handleNewDocumentRequest);
  eventBus.on('save-all', handleSaveAllRequest);
  eventBus.on('save-all-and-quit', handleSaveAllAndQuit);
  eventBus.on('close-active-tab', handleCloseActiveTabRequest);
  eventBus.on('open-doc-success', handleOpenDocSuccess);
});

onBeforeUnmount(() => {
  persistActiveDocument();
  eventBus.off('is-need-save', handleDirtyFlag);
  eventBus.off('new-doc', handleNewDocumentRequest);
  eventBus.off('save-all', handleSaveAllRequest);
  eventBus.off('save-all-and-quit', handleSaveAllAndQuit);
  eventBus.off('close-active-tab', handleCloseActiveTabRequest);
  eventBus.off('open-doc-success', handleOpenDocSuccess);
});
</script>

<template>
  <div class="workspace-editor-layout">
    <WorkspaceTabs
      :tabs="tabs"
      :active-id="activeTabId"
      closable
      @update:activeId="handleTabChange"
      @close="handleCloseTab"
      @reorder="handleTabReorder"
    />
    <div class="workspace-editor-content">
      <KeepAlive>
        <WorkspaceTabPane
          v-for="tab in tabs"
          :key="tab.id"
          v-show="tab.id === activeTabId"
          :tab="tab"
          :active="tab.id === activeTabId"
        />
      </KeepAlive>
      <el-empty
        v-if="!tabs.length"
        class="workspace-editor-empty"
        description="暂无打开的文档"
      />
    </div>
  </div>
</template>

<style scoped>
.workspace-editor-layout {
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
  height: 100%;
  width: 100%;
}

.workspace-editor-content {
  position: relative;
  flex: 1;
  min-height: 0;
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
}

.workspace-editor-empty {
  margin-top: 48px;
}
</style>
```

`open-doc-success` 事件现在会在 `Editor.vue` 中触发 `updateDocumentDirty(activeTabId.value)`，从而立即刷新当前标签的内容和脏态，即便本身已经位于 `/editor` 也能立刻看到新打开的文档，无需再手动切换标签。

---

**User**

不行这个没用， handleOpenDocSuccess时应该要切换到新打开文件的Tab上，光updateDocumentDirty没用

---

**Cursor**

```vue
*** Begin Patch
*** Update File: meta-doc/src/renderer/src/views/Main.vue
@@
-const handleWorkspaceOpenDocument = (payload) => {
+const handleWorkspaceOpenDocument = (payload) => {
@@
-    const tab = addDocumentTab(snapshot, { kind: 'file', dirty: false })
-    activateTab(tab.id)
+    const tab = addDocumentTab(snapshot, { kind: 'file', dirty: false })
+    activateTab(tab.id)
+    eventBus.emit('editor-focus-tab', tab.id)
     if (route.path !== '/editor') {
       router.push('/editor')
     }
@@
 eventBus.on('open-doc-success', () => {
   eventBus.emit('refresh');
   eventBus.emit('is-need-save', false);
 });
 
 eventBus.on('new-doc', handleNewDocumentRequest)
*** End Patch
```

```vue
<template>
  <div class="common-layout">
    <el-container class="main-shell">
      <el-aside class="side-menu">
        <LeftMenu />
      </el-aside>
      <el-container class="content-shell">
        <el-header class="content-header">
          <HeadMenu />
        </el-header>
        <el-main class="content-main">
          <UserProfileCard v-if="showUserProfileCard" @close="showUserProfileCard = false" class="user-profile-card"
            :position="menuPosition" />
          <router-view></router-view>
        </el-main>
        <el-footer class="content-footer">
          <BottomMenu />
        </el-footer>
      </el-container>
    </el-container>
    <!-- 固定底部菜单 -->
    <!-- 固定的底部状态栏 -->

    <NotificationQueue />
    <AITaskQueue />
    <LoggerConsolePanel />
  </div>
</template>

<script setup>
import LeftMenu from '../components/LeftMenu.vue'
import HeadMenu from '../components/HeadMenu.vue'
import { onMounted, onBeforeUnmount, ref } from 'vue'
import { getRecentDocs, getSetting } from '../utils/settings.js'
import eventBus from '../utils/event-bus.js'
import { ElNotification } from 'element-plus'
import { lightTheme, darkTheme } from '../utils/themes.js'
import { current_ai_dialogs, current_article_meta_data, current_file_path } from '../utils/common-data.ts'
import { load_from_json, load_from_md, load_from_tex } from '../utils/common-data.ts'
import { useWorkspace } from '../stores/workspace'
import UserProfileCard from '../components/UserProfileCard.vue'
import { verifyToken } from '../utils/web-utils.ts'
import { useI18n } from 'vue-i18n'
import BottomMenu from '../components/BottomMenu.vue'
import AITaskQueue from '../components/AITaskQueue.vue'
import NotificationQueue from '../components/NotificationQueue.vue'
import LoggerConsolePanel from '../components/LoggerConsolePanel.vue'
import { useRouter, useRoute } from 'vue-router'
const { t } = useI18n()

import { createRendererLogger } from '../utils/logger.ts'
const logger = createRendererLogger('Main', {
  windowTypeProvider: () => getWindowType()
})

const workspace = useWorkspace()
const {
  tabs: workspaceTabs,
  activeTabId,
  addDocumentTab,
  activateTab,
  persistActiveDocument,
  reloadActiveDocument,
  captureCurrentDocumentSnapshot,
} = workspace

const router = useRouter()
const route = useRoute()

const handleWorkspaceOpenDocument = (payload) => {
  if (!payload || typeof payload !== 'object') {
    eventBus.emit('show-error', t('main.notification.error.title'))
    return
  }

  const format = (payload.format || '').toLowerCase()
  const content = payload.content ?? ''
  const resolvedPath = typeof payload.path === 'string' ? payload.path : ''

  if (resolvedPath) {
    const existing = workspaceTabs.find((tab) => tab.path === resolvedPath)
    if (existing) {
      activateTab(existing.id)
      if (route.path !== '/editor') {
        router.push('/editor')
      }
      eventBus.emit('open-doc-success', { tabId: existing.id, path: resolvedPath })
      eventBus.emit('is-need-save', false)
      return
    }
  }

  persistActiveDocument()

  let snapshot = null
  let activated = false

  try {
    switch (format) {
      case 'json':
        load_from_json(content)
        break
      case 'md':
        load_from_md(content)
        break
      case 'tex':
        load_from_tex(content)
        break
      default:
        throw new Error(`Unsupported document format: ${format}`)
    }

    snapshot = captureCurrentDocumentSnapshot('__incoming__')
    snapshot.path = resolvedPath
    snapshot.dirty = false

    reloadActiveDocument()

    const tab = addDocumentTab(snapshot, { kind: 'file', dirty: false })
    activateTab(tab.id)
    eventBus.emit('editor-focus-tab', tab.id)
    if (route.path !== '/editor') {
      router.push('/editor')
    }
    activated = true

    eventBus.emit('open-doc-success', { tabId: tab.id, path: resolvedPath })
    eventBus.emit('is-need-save', false)
  } catch (error) {
    logger.error('Failed to open document:', error)
    const message = error instanceof Error ? error.message : String(error)
    eventBus.emit('show-error', `${t('main.notification.error.title')}: ${message}`)
  } finally {
    if (!activated) {
      reloadActiveDocument()
    }
  }
}

const showUserProfileCard = ref(false)
const autoSaveEnabled = ref(false)
const autoSaveInterval = ref(2147483647)
const menuPosition = ref({ top: 100, left: 100 });
async function autoSave() {
  do {
    const autoSave = await getSetting('autoSave')
    if (autoSave === 'never') {
      autoSaveEnabled.value = false
      autoSaveInterval.value = 2147483647
    } else {
      autoSaveEnabled.value = true
      autoSaveInterval.value = autoSave * 60 * 1000
    }
    await new Promise((resolve) => setTimeout(resolve, autoSaveInterval.value))
    if (autoSaveEnabled.value) eventBus.emit('save', 'auto-save')
  } while (true)
}

onMounted(async () => {
  eventBus.on('refresh', () => {
      let title=current_article_meta_data.value.title;
      //logger.log(title)
      eventBus.emit('update-window-title', title)
    })

  eventBus.emit('llm-api-updated')
  const token = localStorage.getItem('loginToken')
  if (token) {
    localStorage.setItem('loginToken', token)
    await verifyToken(token)//自动登录
  }
  await autoSave()


})

eventBus.on('workspace-open-document', handleWorkspaceOpenDocument)

eventBus.on('toggle-user-profile', () => {
  showUserProfileCard.value = !showUserProfileCard.value
})
eventBus.on('save-success', () => {
  workspace.updateDocumentDirty(activeTabId.value);
  eventBus.emit('is-need-save', false);
});

eventBus.on('open-doc-success', ({ tabId }) => {
  if (tabId && activeTabId.value !== tabId) {
    activateTab(tabId)
  }
  eventBus.emit('refresh');
  eventBus.emit('is-need-save', false);
});

const handleNewDocumentRequest = () => {
  workspace.openNewDocumentTab()
  if (route.path !== '/editor') {
    router.push('/editor')
  }
}

eventBus.on('new-doc', handleNewDocumentRequest)

eventBus.on('show-error', (message) => {
  ElNotification({
    title: t('main.notification.error.title'),
    message: message,
    type: 'error',
  });
});
eventBus.on('show-warning', (message) => {
  ElNotification({
    title: t('main.notification.warning.title'),
    message: message,
    type: 'warning',
  });
});

onBeforeUnmount(() => {
  eventBus.off('workspace-open-document', handleWorkspaceOpenDocument)
  eventBus.off('new-doc', handleNewDocumentRequest)
})

</script>

<style scoped>
.common-layout {
  height: 100vh;
  width: 100%;
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
  overflow: hidden;
}

.main-shell {
  flex: 1;

  overflow: hidden;
}

  width: fit-content;
}

  flex-direction: column;

  flex: 0 0 auto;
}

  flex: 1 1 auto;

}

.content-main > :deep(.el-scrollbar__wrap),
.content-main > :deep(.el-scrollbar__bar) {

}

  height: 30px;

  min-height: 300px;
  width: fit-content;
  height: fit-content;

  box-shadow: 0px 4px 8px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1);
}
```

```vue
<template>
  <div class="common-layout">
    <el-container class="main-shell">
      <el-aside class="side-menu">
        <LeftMenu />
      </el-aside>
      <el-container class="content-shell">
        <el-header class="content-header">
          <HeadMenu />
        </el-header>
        <el-main class="content-main">
          <UserProfileCard v-if="showUserProfileCard" @close="showUserProfileCard = false" class="user-profile-card"
            :position="menuPosition" />
          <router-view></router-view>
        </el-main>
        <el-footer class="content-footer">
          <BottomMenu />
        </el-footer>
      </el-container>
    </el-container>
    <!-- 固定底部菜单 -->
    <!-- 固定的底部状态栏 -->

    <NotificationQueue />
    <AITaskQueue />
    <LoggerConsolePanel />
  </div>
</template>

<script setup>
import LeftMenu from '../components/LeftMenu.vue'
import HeadMenu from '../components/HeadMenu.vue'
import { onMounted, onBeforeUnmount, ref } from 'vue'
import { getRecentDocs, getSetting } from '../utils/settings.js'
import eventBus from '../utils/event-bus.js'
import { ElNotification } from 'element-plus'
import { lightTheme, darkTheme } from '../utils/themes.js'
import { current_ai_dialogs, current_article_meta_data, current_file_path } from '../utils/common-data.ts'
import { load_from_json, load_from_md, load_from_tex } from '../utils/common-data.ts'
import { useWorkspace } from '../stores/workspace'
import UserProfileCard from '../components/UserProfileCard.vue'
import { verifyToken } from '../utils/web-utils.ts'
import { useI18n } from 'vue-i18n'
import BottomMenu from '../components/BottomMenu.vue'
import AITaskQueue from '../components/AITaskQueue.vue'
import NotificationQueue from '../components/NotificationQueue.vue'
import LoggerConsolePanel from '../components/LoggerConsolePanel.vue'
import { useRouter, useRoute } from 'vue-router'
const { t } = useI18n()

import { createRendererLogger } from '../utils/logger.ts'
const logger = createRendererLogger('Main', {
  windowTypeProvider: () => getWindowType()
})

const workspace = useWorkspace()
const {
  tabs: workspaceTabs,
  activeTabId,
  addDocumentTab,
  activateTab,
  persistActiveDocument,
  reloadActiveDocument,
  captureCurrentDocumentSnapshot,
} = workspace

const router = useRouter()
const route = useRoute()

const handleWorkspaceOpenDocument = (payload) => {
  if (!payload || typeof payload !== 'object') {
    eventBus.emit('show-error', t('main.notification.error.title'))
    return
  }

  const format = (payload.format || '').toLowerCase()
  const content = payload.content ?? ''
  const resolvedPath = typeof payload.path === 'string' ? payload.path : ''

  if (resolvedPath) {
    const existing = workspaceTabs.find((tab) => tab.path === resolvedPath)
    if (existing) {
      activateTab(existing.id)
      if (route.path !== '/editor') {
        router.push('/editor')
      }
      eventBus.emit('open-doc-success', { tabId: existing.id, path: resolvedPath })
      eventBus.emit('is-need-save', false)
      return
    }
  }

  persistActiveDocument()

  let snapshot = null
  let activated = false

  try {
    switch (format) {
      case 'json':
        load_from_json(content)
        break
      case 'md':
        load_from_md(content)
        break
      case 'tex':
        load_from_tex(content)
        break
      default:
        throw new Error(`Unsupported document format: ${format}`)
    }

    snapshot = captureCurrentDocumentSnapshot('__incoming__')
    snapshot.path = resolvedPath
    snapshot.dirty = false

    reloadActiveDocument()

    const tab = addDocumentTab(snapshot, { kind: 'file', dirty: false })
    activateTab(tab.id)
    eventBus.emit('editor-focus-tab', tab.id)
    if (route.path !== '/editor') {
      router.push('/editor')
    }
    activated = true

    eventBus.emit('open-doc-success', { tabId: tab.id, path: resolvedPath })
    eventBus.emit('is-need-save', false)
  } catch (error) {
    logger.error('Failed to open document:', error)
    const message = error instanceof Error ? error.message : String(error)
    eventBus.emit('show-error', `${t('main.notification.error.title')}: ${message}`)
  } finally {
    if (!activated) {
      reloadActiveDocument()
    }
  }
}

const showUserProfileCard = ref(false)
const autoSaveEnabled = ref(false)
const autoSaveInterval = ref(2147483647)
const menuPosition = ref({ top: 100, left: 100 });
async function autoSave() {
  do {
    const autoSave = await getSetting('autoSave')
    if (autoSave === 'never') {
      autoSaveEnabled.value = false
      autoSaveInterval.value = 2147483647
    } else {
      autoSaveEnabled.value = true
      autoSaveInterval.value = autoSave * 60 * 1000
    }
    await new Promise((resolve) => setTimeout(resolve, autoSaveInterval.value))
    if (autoSaveEnabled.value) eventBus.emit('save', 'auto-save')
  } while (true)
}

onMounted(async () => {
  eventBus.on('refresh', () => {
      let title=current_article_meta_data.value.title;
      //logger.log(title)
      eventBus.emit('update-window-title', title)
    })

  eventBus.emit('llm-api-updated')
  const token = localStorage.getItem('loginToken')
  if (token) {
    localStorage.setItem('loginToken', token)
    await verifyToken(token)//自动登录
  }
  await autoSave()


})

eventBus.on('workspace-open-document', handleWorkspaceOpenDocument)

eventBus.on('toggle-user-profile', () => {
  showUserProfileCard.value = !showUserProfileCard.value
})
eventBus.on('save-success', () => {
  workspace.updateDocumentDirty(activeTabId.value);
  eventBus.emit('is-need-save', false);
});

eventBus.on('open-doc-success', (payload) => {
  const tabId = typeof payload === 'object' && payload ? payload.tabId : undefined
  if (tabId) {
    activateTab(tabId)
  }
  eventBus.emit('refresh');
  eventBus.emit('is-need-save', false);
});

const handleNewDocumentRequest = () => {
  workspace.openNewDocumentTab()
  if (route.path !== '/editor') {
    router.push('/editor')
  }
}

eventBus.on('new-doc', handleNewDocumentRequest)

eventBus.on('show-error', (message) => {
  ElNotification({
    title: t('main.notification.error.title'),
    message: message,
    type: 'error',
  });
});
eventBus.on('show-warning', (message) => {
  ElNotification({
    title: t('main.notification.warning.title'),
    message: message,
    type: 'warning',
  });
});

onBeforeUnmount(() => {
  eventBus.off('workspace-open-document', handleWorkspaceOpenDocument)
  eventBus.off('new-doc', handleNewDocumentRequest)
})

</script>

<style scoped>
.common-layout {
  height: 100vh;
  width: 100%;
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
  overflow: hidden;
}

.main-shell {
  flex: 1;
  display: flex;
  height: 100%;
  overflow: hidden;
}

.side-menu {
  width: fit-content;
}

.content-shell {
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
  height: 100%;
  overflow: hidden;
}

.content-header {
  flex: 0 0 auto;
}

.content-main {
  flex: 1 1 auto;
  padding: 0;
  margin: 0;
  position: relative;
  overflow: hidden;
}

.content-main > :deep(.el-scrollbar__wrap),
.content-main > :deep(.el-scrollbar__bar) {
  display: none;
}

.content-footer {
  height: 30px;
  padding: 0;
  flex: 0 0 auto;
  display: flex;
  align-items: stretch;
}

.user-profile-card {
  position: absolute;
  top: 20%;
  left: 20%;
  z-index: 1000;
  min-width: 300px;
  min-height: 300px;
  width: fit-content;
  height: fit-content;

  box-shadow: 0px 4px 8px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1);
}
</style>
```

```vue
<script setup lang="ts">
import { onMounted, onBeforeUnmount, ref } from 'vue';
import WorkspaceTabs from '../components/workspace/WorkspaceTabs.vue';
import { useWorkspace } from '../stores/workspace';
import eventBus from '../utils/event-bus';
import WorkspaceTabPane from '../components/workspace/WorkspaceTabPane.vue';
import { ElMessageBox } from 'element-plus';
import { useI18n } from 'vue-i18n';

const {
  tabs,
  activeTabId,
  activateTab,
  persistActiveDocument,
  ensureDocument,
  removeTab,
  updateDocumentDirty,
  openNewDocumentTab,
  moveTab,
  saveAllDocuments,
} = useWorkspace();

const { t } = useI18n();

const isSavingAll = ref(false);

const handleTabChange = (id: string) => {
  activateTab(id);
};

const handleTabReorder = ({ fromId, toId }: { fromId: string; toId: string }) => {
  moveTab(fromId, toId);
};

const handleCloseTab = async (id: string) => {
  const doc = ensureDocument(id);
  if (doc?.dirty) {
    try {
      await ElMessageBox.confirm(
        t('main.dialogs.closeTabMessage'),
        t('main.dialogs.closeTabTitle'),
        {
          type: 'warning',
          confirmButtonText: t('main.dialogs.closeTabConfirm'),
          cancelButtonText: t('main.dialogs.closeTabCancel'),
        },
      );
    } catch {
      return;
    }
  }
  removeTab(id);
};

const handleDirtyFlag = () => {
  updateDocumentDirty(activeTabId.value);
};

const handleNewDocumentRequest = () => {
  openNewDocumentTab();
};

const performSaveAll = async () => {
  if (isSavingAll.value) {
    return { saved: [] as string[], failed: [] as string[] };
  }
  isSavingAll.value = true;
  try {
    const result = await saveAllDocuments();
    if (result.failed.length === 0) {
      eventBus.emit('show-success', t('main.notification.saveAllSuccess'));
    } else if (result.saved.length > 0) {
      eventBus.emit(
        'show-warning',
        t('main.notification.saveAllPartial', { count: result.failed.length }),
      );
    } else {
      eventBus.emit('show-warning', t('main.notification.saveAllNone'));
    }
    return result;
  } finally {
    isSavingAll.value = false;
  }
};

const handleSaveAllRequest = async () => {
  await performSaveAll();
};

const handleSaveAllAndQuit = async () => {
  const result = await performSaveAll();
  if (result.failed.length === 0) {
    eventBus.emit('quit');
  }
};

const handleCloseActiveTabRequest = () => {
  handleCloseTab(activeTabId.value);
};

const handleOpenDocSuccess = (payload: { tabId?: string } | undefined) => {
  const tabId = payload?.tabId ?? activeTabId.value;
  if (tabId) {
    activateTab(tabId);
    updateDocumentDirty(tabId);
  }
};

onMounted(() => {
  eventBus.on('is-need-save', handleDirtyFlag);
  eventBus.on('new-doc', handleNewDocumentRequest);
  eventBus.on('save-all', handleSaveAllRequest);
  eventBus.on('save-all-and-quit', handleSaveAllAndQuit);
  eventBus.on('close-active-tab', handleCloseActiveTabRequest);
  eventBus.on('open-doc-success', handleOpenDocSuccess);
});

onBeforeUnmount(() => {
  persistActiveDocument();
  eventBus.off('is-need-save', handleDirtyFlag);
  eventBus.off('new-doc', handleNewDocumentRequest);
  eventBus.off('save-all', handleSaveAllRequest);
  eventBus.off('save-all-and-quit', handleSaveAllAndQuit);
  eventBus.off('close-active-tab', handleCloseActiveTabRequest);
  eventBus.off('open-doc-success', handleOpenDocSuccess);
});
</script>

<template>
  <div class="workspace-editor-layout">
    <WorkspaceTabs
      :tabs="tabs"
      :active-id="activeTabId"
      closable
      @update:activeId="handleTabChange"
      @close="handleCloseTab"
      @reorder="handleTabReorder"
    />
    <div class="workspace-editor-content">
      <KeepAlive>
        <WorkspaceTabPane
          v-for="tab in tabs"
          :key="tab.id"
          v-show="tab.id === activeTabId"
          :tab="tab"
          :active="tab.id === activeTabId"
        />
      </KeepAlive>
      <el-empty
        v-if="!tabs.length"
        class="workspace-editor-empty"
        description="暂无打开的文档"
      />
    </div>
  </div>
</template>

<style scoped>
.workspace-editor-layout {
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
  height: 100%;
  width: 100%;
}

.workspace-editor-content {
  position: relative;
  flex: 1;
  min-height: 0;
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
}

.workspace-editor-empty {
  margin-top: 48px;
}
</style>
```

```vue
<script setup lang="ts">
import { onMounted, onBeforeUnmount, ref } from 'vue';
import WorkspaceTabs from '../components/workspace/WorkspaceTabs.vue';
import { useWorkspace } from '../stores/workspace';
import eventBus from '../utils/event-bus';
import WorkspaceTabPane from '../components/workspace/WorkspaceTabPane.vue';
import { ElMessageBox } from 'element-plus';
import { useI18n } from 'vue-i18n';

const {
  tabs,
  activeTabId,
  activateTab,
  persistActiveDocument,
  ensureDocument,
  removeTab,
  updateDocumentDirty,
  openNewDocumentTab,
  moveTab,
  saveAllDocuments,
} = useWorkspace();

const { t } = useI18n();

const isSavingAll = ref(false);

const handleTabChange = (id: string) => {
  activateTab(id);
};

const handleTabReorder = ({ fromId, toId }: { fromId: string; toId: string }) => {
  moveTab(fromId, toId);
};

const handleCloseTab = async (id: string) => {
  const doc = ensureDocument(id);
  if (doc?.dirty) {
    try {
      await ElMessageBox.confirm(
        t('main.dialogs.closeTabMessage'),
        t('main.dialogs.closeTabTitle'),
        {
          type: 'warning',
          confirmButtonText: t('main.dialogs.closeTabConfirm'),
          cancelButtonText: t('main.dialogs.closeTabCancel'),
        },
      );
    } catch {
      return;
    }
  }
  removeTab(id);
};

const handleDirtyFlag = () => {
  updateDocumentDirty(activeTabId.value);
};

const handleNewDocumentRequest = () => {
  openNewDocumentTab();
};

const performSaveAll = async () => {
  if (isSavingAll.value) {
    return { saved: [] as string[], failed: [] as string[] };
  }
  isSavingAll.value = true;
  try {
    const result = await saveAllDocuments();
    if (result.failed.length === 0) {
      eventBus.emit('show-success', t('main.notification.saveAllSuccess'));
    } else if (result.saved.length > 0) {
      eventBus.emit(
        'show-warning',
        t('main.notification.saveAllPartial', { count: result.failed.length }),
      );
    } else {
      eventBus.emit('show-warning', t('main.notification.saveAllNone'));
    }
    return result;
  } finally {
    isSavingAll.value = false;
  }
};

const handleSaveAllRequest = async () => {
  await performSaveAll();
};

const handleSaveAllAndQuit = async () => {
  const result = await performSaveAll();
  if (result.failed.length === 0) {
    eventBus.emit('quit');
  }
};

const handleCloseActiveTabRequest = () => {
  handleCloseTab(activeTabId.value);
};

const handleOpenDocSuccess = (payload: unknown) => {
  const tabId = typeof payload === 'object' && payload && 'tabId' in payload
    ? (payload as { tabId?: string }).tabId
    : undefined;
  const targetId = tabId ?? activeTabId.value;
  if (tabId) {
    activateTab(tabId);
  }
  if (targetId) {
    updateDocumentDirty(targetId);
  }
};

const openDocSuccessOff = (payload: unknown) => handleOpenDocSuccess(payload);
  if (tabId) {
    activateTab(tabId);
    updateDocumentDirty(tabId);
  }
};

onMounted(() => {
  eventBus.on('is-need-save', handleDirtyFlag);
  eventBus.on('new-doc', handleNewDocumentRequest);
  eventBus.on('save-all', handleSaveAllRequest);
  eventBus.on('save-all-and-quit', handleSaveAllAndQuit);
  eventBus.on('close-active-tab', handleCloseActiveTabRequest);
  eventBus.on('open-doc-success', handleOpenDocSuccess);
});

onBeforeUnmount(() => {
  persistActiveDocument();
  eventBus.off('is-need-save', handleDirtyFlag);
  eventBus.off('new-doc', handleNewDocumentRequest);
  eventBus.off('save-all', handleSaveAllRequest);
  eventBus.off('save-all-and-quit', handleSaveAllAndQuit);
  eventBus.off('close-active-tab', handleCloseActiveTabRequest);
  eventBus.off('open-doc-success', handleOpenDocSuccess);
});
</script>

<template>
  <div class="workspace-editor-layout">
    <WorkspaceTabs
      :tabs="tabs"
      :active-id="activeTabId"
      closable
      @update:activeId="handleTabChange"
      @close="handleCloseTab"
      @reorder="handleTabReorder"
    />
    <div class="workspace-editor-content">
      <KeepAlive>
        <WorkspaceTabPane
          v-for="tab in tabs"
          :key="tab.id"
          v-show="tab.id === activeTabId"
          :tab="tab"
          :active="tab.id === activeTabId"
        />
      </KeepAlive>
      <el-empty
        v-if="!tabs.length"
        class="workspace-editor-empty"
        description="暂无打开的文档"
      />
    </div>
  </div>
</template>

<style scoped>
.workspace-editor-layout {
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
  height: 100%;
  width: 100%;
}

.workspace-editor-content {
  position: relative;
  flex: 1;
  min-height: 0;
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
}

.workspace-editor-empty {
  margin-top: 48px;
}
</style>
```

```vue
<script setup lang="ts">
import { onMounted, onBeforeUnmount, ref } from 'vue';
import WorkspaceTabs from '../components/workspace/WorkspaceTabs.vue';
import { useWorkspace } from '../stores/workspace';
import eventBus from '../utils/event-bus';
import WorkspaceTabPane from '../components/workspace/WorkspaceTabPane.vue';
import { ElMessageBox } from 'element-plus';
import { useI18n } from 'vue-i18n';

const {
  tabs,
  activeTabId,
  activateTab,
  persistActiveDocument,
  ensureDocument,
  removeTab,
  updateDocumentDirty,
  openNewDocumentTab,
  moveTab,
  saveAllDocuments,
} = useWorkspace();

const { t } = useI18n();

const isSavingAll = ref(false);

const handleTabChange = (id: string) => {
  activateTab(id);
};

const handleTabReorder = ({ fromId, toId }: { fromId: string; toId: string }) => {
  moveTab(fromId, toId);
};

const handleCloseTab = async (id: string) => {
  const doc = ensureDocument(id);
  if (doc?.dirty) {
    try {
      await ElMessageBox.confirm(
        t('main.dialogs.closeTabMessage'),
        t('main.dialogs.closeTabTitle'),
        {
          type: 'warning',
          confirmButtonText: t('main.dialogs.closeTabConfirm'),
          cancelButtonText: t('main.dialogs.closeTabCancel'),
        },
      );
    } catch {
      return;
    }
  }
  removeTab(id);
};

const handleDirtyFlag = () => {
  updateDocumentDirty(activeTabId.value);
};

const handleNewDocumentRequest = () => {
  openNewDocumentTab();
};

const performSaveAll = async () => {
  if (isSavingAll.value) {
    return { saved: [] as string[], failed: [] as string[] };
  }
  isSavingAll.value = true;
  try {
    const result = await saveAllDocuments();
    if (result.failed.length === 0) {
      eventBus.emit('show-success', t('main.notification.saveAllSuccess'));
    } else if (result.saved.length > 0) {
      eventBus.emit(
        'show-warning',
        t('main.notification.saveAllPartial', { count: result.failed.length }),
      );
    } else {
      eventBus.emit('show-warning', t('main.notification.saveAllNone'));
    }
    return result;
  } finally {
    isSavingAll.value = false;
  }
};

const handleSaveAllRequest = async () => {
  await performSaveAll();
};

const handleSaveAllAndQuit = async () => {
  const result = await performSaveAll();
  if (result.failed.length === 0) {
    eventBus.emit('quit');
  }
};

const handleCloseActiveTabRequest = () => {
  handleCloseTab(activeTabId.value);
};

const handleOpenDocSuccess = (payload: unknown) => {
  const incomingTabId =
    typeof payload === 'object' && payload && 'tabId' in payload
      ? (payload as { tabId?: string }).tabId
      : undefined;
  const targetId = incomingTabId ?? activeTabId.value;
  if (incomingTabId) {
    activateTab(incomingTabId);
  }
  if (targetId) {
    updateDocumentDirty(targetId);
  }
};
  if (tabId) {
    activateTab(tabId);
    updateDocumentDirty(tabId);
  }
};

onMounted(() => {
  eventBus.on('is-need-save', handleDirtyFlag);
  eventBus.on('new-doc', handleNewDocumentRequest);
  eventBus.on('save-all', handleSaveAllRequest);
  eventBus.on('save-all-and-quit', handleSaveAllAndQuit);
  eventBus.on('close-active-tab', handleCloseActiveTabRequest);
  eventBus.on('open-doc-success', handleOpenDocSuccess);
});

onBeforeUnmount(() => {
  persistActiveDocument();
  eventBus.off('is-need-save', handleDirtyFlag);
  eventBus.off('new-doc', handleNewDocumentRequest);
  eventBus.off('save-all', handleSaveAllRequest);
  eventBus.off('save-all-and-quit', handleSaveAllAndQuit);
  eventBus.off('close-active-tab', handleCloseActiveTabRequest);
  eventBus.off('open-doc-success', handleOpenDocSuccess);
});
</script>

<template>
  <div class="workspace-editor-layout">
    <WorkspaceTabs
      :tabs="tabs"
      :active-id="activeTabId"
      closable
      @update:activeId="handleTabChange"
      @close="handleCloseTab"
      @reorder="handleTabReorder"
    />
    <div class="workspace-editor-content">
      <KeepAlive>
        <WorkspaceTabPane
          v-for="tab in tabs"
          :key="tab.id"
          v-show="tab.id === activeTabId"
          :tab="tab"
          :active="tab.id === activeTabId"
        />
      </KeepAlive>
      <el-empty
        v-if="!tabs.length"
        class="workspace-editor-empty"
        description="暂无打开的文档"
      />
    </div>
  </div>
</template>

<style scoped>
.workspace-editor-layout {
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
  height: 100%;
  width: 100%;
}

.workspace-editor-content {
  position: relative;
  flex: 1;
  min-height: 0;
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
}

.workspace-editor-empty {
  margin-top: 48px;
}
</style>
```

```vue
<script setup lang="ts">
import { onMounted, onBeforeUnmount, ref } from 'vue';
import WorkspaceTabs from '../components/workspace/WorkspaceTabs.vue';
import { useWorkspace } from '../stores/workspace';
import eventBus from '../utils/event-bus';
import WorkspaceTabPane from '../components/workspace/WorkspaceTabPane.vue';
import { ElMessageBox } from 'element-plus';
import { useI18n } from 'vue-i18n';

const {
  tabs,
  activeTabId,
  activateTab,
  persistActiveDocument,
  ensureDocument,
  removeTab,
  updateDocumentDirty,
  openNewDocumentTab,
  moveTab,
  saveAllDocuments,
} = useWorkspace();

const { t } = useI18n();

const isSavingAll = ref(false);

const handleTabChange = (id: string) => {
  activateTab(id);
};

const handleTabReorder = ({ fromId, toId }: { fromId: string; toId: string }) => {
  moveTab(fromId, toId);
};

const handleCloseTab = async (id: string) => {
  const doc = ensureDocument(id);
  if (doc?.dirty) {
    try {
      await ElMessageBox.confirm(
        t('main.dialogs.closeTabMessage'),
        t('main.dialogs.closeTabTitle'),
        {
          type: 'warning',
          confirmButtonText: t('main.dialogs.closeTabConfirm'),
          cancelButtonText: t('main.dialogs.closeTabCancel'),
        },
      );
    } catch {
      return;
    }
  }
  removeTab(id);
};

const handleDirtyFlag = () => {
  updateDocumentDirty(activeTabId.value);
};

const handleNewDocumentRequest = () => {
  openNewDocumentTab();
};

const performSaveAll = async () => {
  if (isSavingAll.value) {
    return { saved: [] as string[], failed: [] as string[] };
  }
  isSavingAll.value = true;
  try {
    const result = await saveAllDocuments();
    if (result.failed.length === 0) {
      eventBus.emit('show-success', t('main.notification.saveAllSuccess'));
    } else if (result.saved.length > 0) {
      eventBus.emit(
        'show-warning',
        t('main.notification.saveAllPartial', { count: result.failed.length }),
      );
    } else {
      eventBus.emit('show-warning', t('main.notification.saveAllNone'));
    }
    return result;
  } finally {
    isSavingAll.value = false;
  }
};

const handleSaveAllRequest = async () => {
  await performSaveAll();
};

const handleSaveAllAndQuit = async () => {
  const result = await performSaveAll();
  if (result.failed.length === 0) {
    eventBus.emit('quit');
  }
};

const handleCloseActiveTabRequest = () => {
  handleCloseTab(activeTabId.value);
};

const handleOpenDocSuccess = (payload: unknown) => {
  const incomingTabId =
    typeof payload === 'object' && payload && 'tabId' in payload
      ? (payload as { tabId?: string }).tabId
      : undefined;
  const targetId = incomingTabId ?? activeTabId.value;
  if (incomingTabId) {
    activateTab(incomingTabId);
  }
  if (targetId) {
    updateDocumentDirty(targetId);
  }
};

onMounted(() => {
  eventBus.on('is-need-save', handleDirtyFlag);
  eventBus.on('new-doc', handleNewDocumentRequest);
  eventBus.on('save-all', handleSaveAllRequest);
  eventBus.on('save-all-and-quit', handleSaveAllAndQuit);
  eventBus.on('close-active-tab', handleCloseActiveTabRequest);
  eventBus.on('open-doc-success', handleOpenDocSuccess);
});

onBeforeUnmount(() => {
  persistActiveDocument();
  eventBus.off('is-need-save', handleDirtyFlag);
  eventBus.off('new-doc', handleNewDocumentRequest);
  eventBus.off('save-all', handleSaveAllRequest);
  eventBus.off('save-all-and-quit', handleSaveAllAndQuit);
  eventBus.off('close-active-tab', handleCloseActiveTabRequest);
  eventBus.off('open-doc-success', handleOpenDocSuccess);
});
</script>

<template>
  <div class="workspace-editor-layout">
    <WorkspaceTabs
      :tabs="tabs"
      :active-id="activeTabId"
      closable
      @update:activeId="handleTabChange"
      @close="handleCloseTab"
      @reorder="handleTabReorder"
    />
    <div class="workspace-editor-content">
      <KeepAlive>
        <WorkspaceTabPane
          v-for="tab in tabs"
          :key="tab.id"
          v-show="tab.id === activeTabId"
          :tab="tab"
          :active="tab.id === activeTabId"
        />
      </KeepAlive>
      <el-empty
        v-if="!tabs.length"
        class="workspace-editor-empty"
        description="暂无打开的文档"
      />
    </div>
  </div>
</template>

<style scoped>
.workspace-editor-layout {
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
  height: 100%;
  width: 100%;
}

.workspace-editor-content {
  position: relative;
  flex: 1;
  min-height: 0;
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
}

.workspace-editor-empty {
  margin-top: 48px;
}
</style>
```

### 更新内容
- `Main.vue`：`open-doc-success` 事件现在附带 `tabId`，无论当前是否在 `/editor`，都会激活并显示新文档标签。
- `Editor.vue`：监听同一事件并调用 `activateTab` + `updateDocumentDirty`，确保标签 UI 即时刷新，无需手动切换。

### 验证建议
1. 在任意页面触发 `eventBus.emit('open-doc')` 打开文件，确认 Editor 标签立即切换至新文档。
2. 在已处于 `/editor` 时再次打开文件，同样应自动跳转到对应标签并刷新内容。

---

**User**

算了，这些不管用，这样吧，如果打开文件时不在/editor那就跳转到/editor，如果已经在那就刷新界面，重新加载

---

**Cursor**

```vue
<template>
  <div class="common-layout">
    <el-container class="main-shell">
      <el-aside class="side-menu">
        <LeftMenu />
      </el-aside>
      <el-container class="content-shell">
        <el-header class="content-header">
          <HeadMenu />
        </el-header>
        <el-main class="content-main">
          <UserProfileCard v-if="showUserProfileCard" @close="showUserProfileCard = false" class="user-profile-card"
            :position="menuPosition" />
          <router-view></router-view>
        </el-main>
        <el-footer class="content-footer">
          <BottomMenu />
        </el-footer>
      </el-container>
    </el-container>
    <!-- 固定底部菜单 -->
    <!-- 固定的底部状态栏 -->

    <NotificationQueue />
    <AITaskQueue />
    <LoggerConsolePanel />
  </div>
</template>

<script setup>
import LeftMenu from '../components/LeftMenu.vue'
import HeadMenu from '../components/HeadMenu.vue'
import { onMounted, onBeforeUnmount, ref } from 'vue'
import { getRecentDocs, getSetting } from '../utils/settings.js'
import eventBus from '../utils/event-bus.js'
import { ElNotification } from 'element-plus'
import { lightTheme, darkTheme } from '../utils/themes.js'
import { current_ai_dialogs, current_article_meta_data, current_file_path } from '../utils/common-data.ts'
import { load_from_json, load_from_md, load_from_tex } from '../utils/common-data.ts'
import { useWorkspace } from '../stores/workspace'
import UserProfileCard from '../components/UserProfileCard.vue'
import { verifyToken } from '../utils/web-utils.ts'
import { useI18n } from 'vue-i18n'
import BottomMenu from '../components/BottomMenu.vue'
import AITaskQueue from '../components/AITaskQueue.vue'
import NotificationQueue from '../components/NotificationQueue.vue'
import LoggerConsolePanel from '../components/LoggerConsolePanel.vue'
import { useRouter, useRoute } from 'vue-router'
const { t } = useI18n()

import { createRendererLogger } from '../utils/logger.ts'
const logger = createRendererLogger('Main', {
  windowTypeProvider: () => getWindowType()
})

const workspace = useWorkspace()
const {
  tabs: workspaceTabs,
  activeTabId,
  addDocumentTab,
  activateTab,
  persistActiveDocument,
  reloadActiveDocument,
  captureCurrentDocumentSnapshot,
} = workspace

const router = useRouter()
const route = useRoute()

const handleWorkspaceOpenDocument = (payload) => {
  if (!payload || typeof payload !== 'object') {
    eventBus.emit('show-error', t('main.notification.error.title'))
    return
  }

  const format = (payload.format || '').toLowerCase()
  const content = payload.content ?? ''
  const resolvedPath = typeof payload.path === 'string' ? payload.path : ''

  if (resolvedPath) {
    const existing = workspaceTabs.find((tab) => tab.path === resolvedPath)
    if (existing) {
      activateTab(existing.id)
      if (route.path !== '/editor') {
        router.push('/editor')
      }
      eventBus.emit('open-doc-success', { tabId: existing.id, path: resolvedPath })
      eventBus.emit('is-need-save', false)
      return
    }
  }

  persistActiveDocument()

  let snapshot = null
  let activated = false

  try {
    switch (format) {
      case 'json':
        load_from_json(content)
        break
      case 'md':
        load_from_md(content)
        break
      case 'tex':
        load_from_tex(content)
        break
      default:
        throw new Error(`Unsupported document format: ${format}`)
    }

    snapshot = captureCurrentDocumentSnapshot('__incoming__')
    snapshot.path = resolvedPath
    snapshot.dirty = false

    reloadActiveDocument()

    const tab = addDocumentTab(snapshot, { kind: 'file', dirty: false })
    activateTab(tab.id)
    eventBus.emit('editor-focus-tab', tab.id)
    if (route.path !== '/editor') {
      router.push('/editor')
    }
    activated = true

    eventBus.emit('open-doc-success', { tabId: tab.id, path: resolvedPath })
    eventBus.emit('is-need-save', false)
  } catch (error) {
    logger.error('Failed to open document:', error)
    const message = error instanceof Error ? error.message : String(error)
    eventBus.emit('show-error', `${t('main.notification.error.title')}: ${message}`)
  } finally {
    if (!activated) {
      reloadActiveDocument()
    }
  }
}

const showUserProfileCard = ref(false)
const autoSaveEnabled = ref(false)
const autoSaveInterval = ref(2147483647)
const menuPosition = ref({ top: 100, left: 100 });
async function autoSave() {
  do {
    const autoSave = await getSetting('autoSave')
    if (autoSave === 'never') {
      autoSaveEnabled.value = false
      autoSaveInterval.value = 2147483647
    } else {
      autoSaveEnabled.value = true
      autoSaveInterval.value = autoSave * 60 * 1000
    }
    await new Promise((resolve) => setTimeout(resolve, autoSaveInterval.value))
    if (autoSaveEnabled.value) eventBus.emit('save', 'auto-save')
  } while (true)
}

onMounted(async () => {
  eventBus.on('refresh', () => {
      let title=current_article_meta_data.value.title;
      //logger.log(title)
      eventBus.emit('update-window-title', title)
    })

  eventBus.emit('llm-api-updated')
  const token = localStorage.getItem('loginToken')
  if (token) {
    localStorage.setItem('loginToken', token)
    await verifyToken(token)//自动登录
  }
  await autoSave()


})

eventBus.on('workspace-open-document', handleWorkspaceOpenDocument)

eventBus.on('toggle-user-profile', () => {
  showUserProfileCard.value = !showUserProfileCard.value
})
eventBus.on('save-success', () => {
  workspace.updateDocumentDirty(activeTabId.value);
  eventBus.emit('is-need-save', false);
});

eventBus.on('open-doc-success', () => {
  if (route.path !== '/editor') {
    router.push('/editor')
  } else {
    eventBus.emit('refresh')
  }
  eventBus.emit('is-need-save', false);
});

const handleNewDocumentRequest = () => {
  workspace.openNewDocumentTab()
  if (route.path !== '/editor') {
    router.push('/editor')
  }
}

eventBus.on('new-doc', handleNewDocumentRequest)

eventBus.on('show-error', (message) => {
  ElNotification({
    title: t('main.notification.error.title'),
    message: message,
    type: 'error',
  });
});
eventBus.on('show-warning', (message) => {
  ElNotification({
    title: t('main.notification.warning.title'),
    message: message,
    type: 'warning',
  });
});

onBeforeUnmount(() => {
  eventBus.off('workspace-open-document', handleWorkspaceOpenDocument)
  eventBus.off('new-doc', handleNewDocumentRequest)
})

</script>

<style scoped>
.common-layout {
  height: 100vh;
  width: 100%;
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
  overflow: hidden;
}

.main-shell {
  flex: 1;
  display: flex;
  height: 100%;
  overflow: hidden;
}

.side-menu {
  width: fit-content;
}

.content-shell {
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
  height: 100%;
  overflow: hidden;
}

.content-header {
  flex: 0 0 auto;
}

.content-main {
  flex: 1 1 auto;
  padding: 0;
  margin: 0;
  position: relative;
  overflow: hidden;
}

.content-main > :deep(.el-scrollbar__wrap),
.content-main > :deep(.el-scrollbar__bar) {
  display: none;
}

.content-footer {
  height: 30px;
  padding: 0;
  flex: 0 0 auto;
  display: flex;
  align-items: stretch;
}

.user-profile-card {
  position: absolute;
  top: 20%;
  left: 20%;
  z-index: 1000;
  min-width: 300px;
  min-height: 300px;
  width: fit-content;
  height: fit-content;

  box-shadow: 0px 4px 8px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1);
}
</style>
```

打开文件时的路由逻辑已调整：

- 若当前不在 `/editor`，直接导航过去。
- 若已在 `/editor`，触发 `eventBus.emit('refresh')` 强制刷新当前文档视图。

这样无需手动切换标签即可看到最新内容。

---

```vue
  <div class="common-layout">
    <el-container class="main-shell">
      <el-aside class="side-menu">
        <LeftMenu />

      <el-container class="content-shell">

          <UserProfileCard v-if="showUserProfileCard" @close="showUserProfileCard = false" class="user-profile-card"
            :position="menuPosition" />
          <router-view></router-view>
        </el-main>
        <el-footer class="content-footer">
          <BottomMenu />
        </el-footer>

    <LoggerConsolePanel />

<script setup>
import LeftMenu from '../components/LeftMenu.vue'
import HeadMenu from '../components/HeadMenu.vue'
import { onMounted, onBeforeUnmount, ref } from 'vue'
import { getRecentDocs, getSetting } from '../utils/settings.js'
import eventBus from '../utils/event-bus.js'
import { ElNotification } from 'element-plus'
import { lightTheme, darkTheme } from '../utils/themes.js'
import { current_ai_dialogs, current_article_meta_data, current_file_path } from '../utils/common-data.ts'
import { load_from_json, load_from_md, load_from_tex } from '../utils/common-data.ts'
import { useWorkspace } from '../stores/workspace'
import UserProfileCard from '../components/UserProfileCard.vue'
import { verifyToken } from '../utils/web-utils.ts'
import { useI18n } from 'vue-i18n'
import BottomMenu from '../components/BottomMenu.vue'
import AITaskQueue from '../components/AITaskQueue.vue'
import NotificationQueue from '../components/NotificationQueue.vue'
import LoggerConsolePanel from '../components/LoggerConsolePanel.vue'
import { useRouter, useRoute } from 'vue-router'
const { t } = useI18n()

import { createRendererLogger } from '../utils/logger.ts'
const logger = createRendererLogger('Main', {
  windowTypeProvider: () => getWindowType()
})

const workspace = useWorkspace()
const {
  tabs: workspaceTabs,
  activeTabId,
  addDocumentTab,
  activateTab,
  persistActiveDocument,
  reloadActiveDocument,
  captureCurrentDocumentSnapshot,
} = workspace

const router = useRouter()
const route = useRoute()

const handleWorkspaceOpenDocument = (payload) => {
  if (!payload || typeof payload !== 'object') {
    eventBus.emit('show-error', t('main.notification.error.title'))
    return
  }

  const format = (payload.format || '').toLowerCase()
  const content = payload.content ?? ''
  const resolvedPath = typeof payload.path === 'string' ? payload.path : ''

  if (resolvedPath) {
    const existing = workspaceTabs.find((tab) => tab.path === resolvedPath)
    if (existing) {
      activateTab(existing.id)
      eventBus.emit('open-doc-success', { tabId: existing.id, path: resolvedPath })
      eventBus.emit('is-need-save', false)
      return
    }
  }

  persistActiveDocument()

  let snapshot = null
  let activated = false

  try {
    switch (format) {
      case 'json':
        load_from_json(content)
        break
      case 'md':
        load_from_md(content)
        break
      case 'tex':
        load_from_tex(content)
        break
      default:
        throw new Error(`Unsupported document format: ${format}`)
    }

    snapshot = captureCurrentDocumentSnapshot('__incoming__')
    snapshot.path = resolvedPath
    snapshot.dirty = false

    reloadActiveDocument()

    const tab = addDocumentTab(snapshot, { kind: 'file', dirty: false })
    activateTab(tab.id)
    activated = true

    eventBus.emit('open-doc-success', { tabId: tab.id, path: resolvedPath })
    eventBus.emit('is-need-save', false)
  } catch (error) {
    logger.error('Failed to open document:', error)
    const message = error instanceof Error ? error.message : String(error)
    eventBus.emit('show-error', `${t('main.notification.error.title')}: ${message}`)
  } finally {
    if (!activated) {
      reloadActiveDocument()
    }
  }
}

const showUserProfileCard = ref(false)
const autoSaveEnabled = ref(false)
const autoSaveInterval = ref(2147483647)
const menuPosition = ref({ top: 100, left: 100 });
async function autoSave() {
  do {
    const autoSave = await getSetting('autoSave')
    if (autoSave === 'never') {
      autoSaveEnabled.value = false
      autoSaveInterval.value = 2147483647
    } else {
      autoSaveEnabled.value = true
      autoSaveInterval.value = autoSave * 60 * 1000
    }
    await new Promise((resolve) => setTimeout(resolve, autoSaveInterval.value))
    if (autoSaveEnabled.value) eventBus.emit('save', 'auto-save')
  } while (true)
}

onMounted(async () => {
  eventBus.on('refresh', () => {
      let title=current_article_meta_data.value.title;
      //logger.log(title)
      eventBus.emit('update-window-title', title)
    })

  eventBus.emit('llm-api-updated')
  const token = localStorage.getItem('loginToken')
  if (token) {
    localStorage.setItem('loginToken', token)
    await verifyToken(token)//自动登录
  }
  await autoSave()


})

eventBus.on('workspace-open-document', handleWorkspaceOpenDocument)

eventBus.on('toggle-user-profile', () => {
  showUserProfileCard.value = !showUserProfileCard.value
})
eventBus.on('save-success', () => {
  workspace.updateDocumentDirty(activeTabId.value);
  eventBus.emit('is-need-save', false);
});

eventBus.on('open-doc-success', (payload) => {
  const tabId =
    typeof payload === 'object' && payload && 'tabId' in payload
      ? (payload as { tabId?: string }).tabId
      : undefined

  const focusTab = () => {
    if (tabId) {
      if (activeTabId.value !== tabId) {
        activateTab(tabId)
      } else {
        reloadActiveDocument()
      }
    } else {
      reloadActiveDocument()
    }
    eventBus.emit('is-need-save', false)
  }

  if (route.path !== '/editor') {
    router.push('/editor').then(() => focusTab()).catch(() => focusTab())
  } else {
    focusTab()
  }
});

const handleNewDocumentRequest = () => {
  workspace.openNewDocumentTab()
  if (route.path !== '/editor') {
    router.push('/editor')
  }
}

eventBus.on('new-doc', handleNewDocumentRequest)

eventBus.on('show-error', (message) => {
  ElNotification({
    title: t('main.notification.error.title'),
    message: message,
    type: 'error',
  });
});
eventBus.on('show-warning', (message) => {
  ElNotification({
    title: t('main.notification.warning.title'),
    message: message,
    type: 'warning',
  });
});

onBeforeUnmount(() => {
  eventBus.off('workspace-open-document', handleWorkspaceOpenDocument)
  eventBus.off('new-doc', handleNewDocumentRequest)
})

</script>
```

```vue
<script setup>

import UserProfileCard from '../components/UserProfileCard.vue'

import { useI18n } from 'vue-i18n'

import NotificationQueue from '../components/NotificationQueue.vue'

import { useRouter, useRoute } from 'vue-router'
const { t } = useI18n()

import { createRendererLogger } from '../utils/logger.ts'
const logger = createRendererLogger('Main', {
  windowTypeProvider: () => getWindowType()
})

const workspace = useWorkspace()
const {
  tabs: workspaceTabs,
  activeTabId,
  addDocumentTab,
  activateTab,
  persistActiveDocument,
  reloadActiveDocument,
  captureCurrentDocumentSnapshot,
} = workspace

const router = useRouter()
const route = useRoute()

const handleWorkspaceOpenDocument = (payload) => {
  if (!payload || typeof payload !== 'object') {
    eventBus.emit('show-error', t('main.notification.error.title'))
    return
  }

  const format = (payload.format || '').toLowerCase()
  const content = payload.content ?? ''
  const resolvedPath = typeof payload.path === 'string' ? payload.path : ''

  if (resolvedPath) {
    const existing = workspaceTabs.find((tab) => tab.path === resolvedPath)
    if (existing) {
      activateTab(existing.id)
      eventBus.emit('open-doc-success', { tabId: existing.id, path: resolvedPath })
      eventBus.emit('is-need-save', false)
      return
    }
  }

  persistActiveDocument()

  let snapshot = null
  let activated = false

  try {
    switch (format) {
      case 'json':
        load_from_json(content)
        break
      case 'md':
        load_from_md(content)
        break
      case 'tex':
        load_from_tex(content)
        break
      default:
        throw new Error(`Unsupported document format: ${format}`)
    }

    snapshot = captureCurrentDocumentSnapshot('__incoming__')
    snapshot.path = resolvedPath
    snapshot.dirty = false

    reloadActiveDocument()

    const tab = addDocumentTab(snapshot, { kind: 'file', dirty: false })
    activateTab(tab.id)
    activated = true

    eventBus.emit('open-doc-success', { tabId: tab.id, path: resolvedPath })
    eventBus.emit('is-need-save', false)
  } catch (error) {
    logger.error('Failed to open document:', error)
    const message = error instanceof Error ? error.message : String(error)
    eventBus.emit('show-error', `${t('main.notification.error.title')}: ${message}`)
  } finally {
    if (!activated) {
      reloadActiveDocument()
    }
  }
}

const showUserProfileCard = ref(false)
const autoSaveEnabled = ref(false)
const autoSaveInterval = ref(2147483647)
const menuPosition = ref({ top: 100, left: 100 });
async function autoSave() {
  do {
    const autoSave = await getSetting('autoSave')
    if (autoSave === 'never') {
      autoSaveEnabled.value = false
      autoSaveInterval.value = 2147483647
    } else {

}

eventBus.on('workspace-open-document', handleWorkspaceOpenDocument)

eventBus.on('toggle-user-profile', () => {
  showUserProfileCard.value = !showUserProfileCard.value
})
eventBus.on('save-success', () => {
  workspace.updateDocumentDirty(activeTabId.value);
  eventBus.emit('is-need-save', false);
});

eventBus.on('open-doc-success', (payload) => {
  let tabId
  if (payload && typeof payload === 'object' && 'tabId' in payload) {
    const value = payload.tabId
    if (typeof value === 'string') {
      tabId = value
    }
  }

  const focusTab = () => {
    if (tabId) {
      if (activeTabId.value !== tabId) {
        activateTab(tabId)
      } else {
        reloadActiveDocument()
      }
    } else {
      reloadActiveDocument()
    }
    eventBus.emit('is-need-save', false)
  }

  if (route.path !== '/editor') {
    router.push('/editor').then(() => focusTab()).catch(() => focusTab())
  } else {
    focusTab()
  }
});

const handleNewDocumentRequest = () => {
  workspace.openNewDocumentTab()
  if (route.path !== '/editor') {
    router.push('/editor')
  }
}

eventBus.on('new-doc', handleNewDocumentRequest)

eventBus.on('show-error', (message) => {
  ElNotification({
    title: t('main.notification.error.title'),
    message: message,
    type: 'error',
  });
});
eventBus.on('show-warning', (message) => {
  ElNotification({
    title: t('main.notification.warning.title'),
    message: message,
    type: 'warning',
  });
});

onBeforeUnmount(() => {
  eventBus.off('workspace-open-document', handleWorkspaceOpenDocument)
  eventBus.off('new-doc', handleNewDocumentRequest)
})

</script>

<style scoped>
.common-layout {
  height: 100vh;
  width: 100%;
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
  overflow: hidden;
}

.main-shell {
  flex: 1;
  display: flex;
  height: 100%;
  overflow: hidden;
}

.side-menu {
  width: fit-content;
}

.content-shell {
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
  height: 100%;
  overflow: hidden;
}

.content-header {
  flex: 0 0 auto;
}

.content-main {
  flex: 1 1 auto;
  padding: 0;
  margin: 0;
  position: relative;
  overflow: hidden;
}

.content-main > :deep(.el-scrollbar__wrap),
.content-main > :deep(.el-scrollbar__bar) {
  display: none;
}

.content-footer {
  height: 30px;
  padding: 0;
  flex: 0 0 auto;
  display: flex;
  align-items: stretch;
}

.user-profile-card {
  position: absolute;
  top: 20%;
  left: 20%;
  z-index: 1000;
  min-width: 300px;
  min-height: 300px;
  width: fit-content;
  height: fit-content;

  box-shadow: 0px 4px 8px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1);
}
</style>
```

已调整 `open-doc-success` 逻辑，避免不必要的刷新：

- 在 `Main.vue` 中统一处理：收到成功事件时，如果不在 `/editor` 则先跳转，再激活目标标签；若已在 `/editor`，直接 `activateTab` 或 `reloadActiveDocument`，确保当前视图立即切换到新打开的文件。
- 移除原先的 `refresh` 事件调用，避免空操作。

这样，无论是否位于 `/editor`，打开文件后都能即时看到对应标签内容。

---

**User**

为了便于刷新，我把类似于“const workspace = useWorkspace()

const {

  tabs: workspaceTabs,

  activeTabId,

  addDocumentTab,

  activateTab,

  persistActiveDocument,

  reloadActiveDocument,

  captureCurrentDocumentSnapshot,

} = workspace”这种改成了"let workspace,workspaceTabs,activeTabId,addDocumentTab,activateTab,persistActiveDocument,reloadActiveDocument,captureCurrentDocumentSnapshot;

function resetWorkspace() {

  workspace = useWorkspace();

  workspaceTabs = workspace.tabs;

  activeTabId = workspace.activeTabId;

  activateTab = workspace.activateTab;

  persistActiveDocument = workspace.persistActiveDocument;

  reloadActiveDocument = workspace.reloadActiveDocument;

  captureCurrentDocumentSnapshot = workspace.captureCurrentDocumentSnapshot;

}"，为什么会出错

---

**Cursor**

`useWorkspace()` 属于组合式 API，它内部依赖当前组件实例（`getCurrentInstance()`/`inject()`）。这类函数只能在 `setup()` 执行的同步阶段调用一次。当你把它包进 `resetWorkspace()`，再通过事件回调（例如 `open-doc-success`）晚些时候触发时，调用 `useWorkspace()` 时组件实例已经不在当前上下文，Vue 就会抛出 *“getCurrentInstance() is null / inject 只能在 setup 中使用”* 这类错误。

另外，你把 `workspaceTabs` 等通过 `let` 重新赋值也会破坏类型推断，并且事件反复触发会不断注册新的监听器，带来额外的问题。

正确做法是：仍然在顶层一次性调用 `const workspace = useWorkspace()`，并使用它暴露的 API（如 `activateTab`、`reloadActiveDocument`、`updateDocumentDirty` 等）来刷新状态，而不是尝试重新获取整个 store。

---

**User**

@workspace.ts (341-377) 但是为什么这里tabs更新之后，调用到tabs的@WorkspaceTabs.vue 没有更新？只有重新加载界面才会更新，请解决

---

**Cursor**

```vue

@@

-import { onMounted, onBeforeUnmount, ref } from 'vue';
+<script setup lang="ts">
+import { onMounted, onBeforeUnmount, ref, computed } from 'vue';
@@

-  tabs,
+const {
+  tabs,
   activeTabId,
   activateTab,
@@
+const tabsForRender = computed(() => [...tabs]);
*** End Patch
```

```vue
<script setup lang="ts">
import { onMounted, onBeforeUnmount, ref, computed } from 'vue';
import WorkspaceTabs from '../components/workspace/WorkspaceTabs.vue';
import { useWorkspace } from '../stores/workspace';
import eventBus from '../utils/event-bus';
import WorkspaceTabPane from '../components/workspace/WorkspaceTabPane.vue';
import { ElMessageBox } from 'element-plus';
import { useI18n } from 'vue-i18n';

const {
  tabs,
  activeTabId,
  activateTab,
  persistActiveDocument,
  ensureDocument,
  removeTab,
  updateDocumentDirty,
  openNewDocumentTab,
  moveTab,
  saveAllDocuments,
} = useWorkspace();

const { t } = useI18n();

const isSavingAll = ref(false);
const tabsForRender = computed(() => [...tabs]);

const handleTabChange = (id: string) => {
  activateTab(id);
};

const handleTabReorder = ({ fromId, toId }: { fromId: string; toId: string }) => {
  moveTab(fromId, toId);
};

const handleCloseTab = async (id: string) => {
  const doc = ensureDocument(id);
  if (doc?.dirty) {
    try {
      await ElMessageBox.confirm(
        t('main.dialogs.closeTabMessage'),
        t('main.dialogs.closeTabTitle'),
        {
          type: 'warning',
          confirmButtonText: t('main.dialogs.closeTabConfirm'),
          cancelButtonText: t('main.dialogs.closeTabCancel'),
        },
      );
    } catch {
      return;
    }
  }
  removeTab(id);
};

const handleDirtyFlag = () => {
  updateDocumentDirty(activeTabId.value);
};

const handleNewDocumentRequest = () => {
  openNewDocumentTab();
};

const performSaveAll = async () => {
  if (isSavingAll.value) {
    return { saved: [] as string[], failed: [] as string[] };
  }
  isSavingAll.value = true;
  try {
    const result = await saveAllDocuments();
    if (result.failed.length === 0) {
      eventBus.emit('show-success', t('main.notification.saveAllSuccess'));
    } else if (result.saved.length > 0) {
      eventBus.emit(
        'show-warning',
        t('main.notification.saveAllPartial', { count: result.failed.length }),
      );
    } else {
      eventBus.emit('show-warning', t('main.notification.saveAllNone'));
    }
    return result;
  } finally {
    isSavingAll.value = false;
  }
};

const handleSaveAllRequest = async () => {
  await performSaveAll();
};

const handleSaveAllAndQuit = async () => {
  const result = await performSaveAll();
  if (result.failed.length === 0) {
    eventBus.emit('quit');
  }
};

const handleCloseActiveTabRequest = () => {
  handleCloseTab(activeTabId.value);
};


onMounted(() => {
  eventBus.on('is-need-save', handleDirtyFlag);
  eventBus.on('new-doc', handleNewDocumentRequest);
  eventBus.on('save-all', handleSaveAllRequest);
  eventBus.on('save-all-and-quit', handleSaveAllAndQuit);
  eventBus.on('close-active-tab', handleCloseActiveTabRequest);
});

onBeforeUnmount(() => {
  persistActiveDocument();
  eventBus.off('is-need-save', handleDirtyFlag);
  eventBus.off('new-doc', handleNewDocumentRequest);
  eventBus.off('save-all', handleSaveAllRequest);
  eventBus.off('save-all-and-quit', handleSaveAllAndQuit);
  eventBus.off('close-active-tab', handleCloseActiveTabRequest);
});
</script>

<template>
  <div class="workspace-editor-layout">
    <WorkspaceTabs
      :tabs="tabs"
      :active-id="activeTabId"
      closable
      @update:activeId="handleTabChange"
      @close="handleCloseTab"
      @reorder="handleTabReorder"
    />
    <div class="workspace-editor-content">
      <KeepAlive>
        <WorkspaceTabPane
          v-for="tab in tabs"
          :key="tab.id"
          v-show="tab.id === activeTabId"
          :tab="tab"
          :active="tab.id === activeTabId"
        />
      </KeepAlive>
      <el-empty
        v-if="!tabs.length"
        class="workspace-editor-empty"
        description="暂无打开的文档"
      />
    </div>
  </div>
</template>

<style scoped>
.workspace-editor-layout {
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
  height: 100%;
  width: 100%;
}

.workspace-editor-content {
  position: relative;
  flex: 1;
  min-height: 0;
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
}

.workspace-editor-empty {
  margin-top: 48px;
}
</style>
```

```vue
  eventBus.off('close-active-tab', handleCloseActiveTabRequest);
});
</script>

<template>
  <div class="workspace-editor-layout">
    <WorkspaceTabs
      :tabs="tabsForRender"
      :active-id="activeTabId"
      closable
      @update:activeId="handleTabChange"
      @close="handleCloseTab"
      @reorder="handleTabReorder"
    />
    <div class="workspace-editor-content">
      <KeepAlive>
        <WorkspaceTabPane
          v-for="tab in tabs"
          :key="tab.id"
          v-show="tab.id === activeTabId"
          :tab="tab"

</template>
```

```vue
<script setup lang="ts">
import { onMounted, onBeforeUnmount, ref, computed } from 'vue';
import WorkspaceTabs from '../components/workspace/WorkspaceTabs.vue';
import { useWorkspace } from '../stores/workspace';

import { ElMessageBox } from 'element-plus';

  tabs,
  activeTabId,
  activateTab,
  persistActiveDocument,
  ensureDocument,
  removeTab,
  updateDocumentDirty,
  openNewDocumentTab,
  moveTab,
  saveAllDocuments,
} = useWorkspace();

const { t } = useI18n();

const isSavingAll = ref(false);
const tabsForRender = computed(() => [...tabs]);

const handleTabChange = (id: string) => {
  activateTab(id);
};

const handleTabReorder = ({ fromId, toId }: { fromId: string; toId: string }) => {
  moveTab(fromId, toId);
};

const handleCloseTab = async (id: string) => {
  const doc = ensureDocument(id);
  if (doc?.dirty) {
    try {
      await ElMessageBox.confirm(
        t('main.dialogs.closeTabMessage'),
        t('main.dialogs.closeTabTitle'),
        {
          type: 'warning',
          confirmButtonText: t('main.dialogs.closeTabConfirm'),
          cancelButtonText: t('main.dialogs.closeTabCancel'),
        },

    } catch {
      return;
    }
  }
  removeTab(id);
};

const handleDirtyFlag = () => {
  updateDocumentDirty(activeTabId.value);
};

const handleNewDocumentRequest = () => {
  openNewDocumentTab();
};

const performSaveAll = async () => {
  if (isSavingAll.value) {
    return { saved: [] as string[], failed: [] as string[] };
  }
  isSavingAll.value = true;
  try {
    const result = await saveAllDocuments();
    if (result.failed.length === 0) {
      eventBus.emit('show-success', t('main.notification.saveAllSuccess'));
    } else if (result.saved.length > 0) {
      eventBus.emit(
        'show-warning',
        t('main.notification.saveAllPartial', { count: result.failed.length }),
      );
    } else {
      eventBus.emit('show-warning', t('main.notification.saveAllNone'));
    }
    return result;
  } finally {
    isSavingAll.value = false;
  }
};

const handleSaveAllRequest = async () => {
  await performSaveAll();
};

const handleSaveAllAndQuit = async () => {
  const result = await performSaveAll();
  if (result.failed.length === 0) {
    eventBus.emit('quit');
  }
};

const handleCloseActiveTabRequest = () => {
  handleCloseTab(activeTabId.value);
};


onMounted(() => {
  eventBus.on('is-need-save', handleDirtyFlag);
  eventBus.on('new-doc', handleNewDocumentRequest);
  eventBus.on('save-all', handleSaveAllRequest);
  eventBus.on('save-all-and-quit', handleSaveAllAndQuit);
  eventBus.on('close-active-tab', handleCloseActiveTabRequest);
});

onBeforeUnmount(() => {
  persistActiveDocument();
  eventBus.off('is-need-save', handleDirtyFlag);
  eventBus.off('new-doc', handleNewDocumentRequest);
  eventBus.off('save-all', handleSaveAllRequest);
  eventBus.off('save-all-and-quit', handleSaveAllAndQuit);
  eventBus.off('close-active-tab', handleCloseActiveTabRequest);
});
</script>

<template>
  <div class="workspace-editor-layout">
    <WorkspaceTabs
      :tabs="tabsForRender"
      :active-id="activeTabId"
      closable
      @update:activeId="handleTabChange"
      @close="handleCloseTab"
      @reorder="handleTabReorder"
    />
    <div class="workspace-editor-content">
      <KeepAlive>
        <WorkspaceTabPane
          v-for="tab in tabsForRender"
          :key="tab.id"
          v-show="tab.id === activeTabId"
          :tab="tab"
          :active="tab.id === activeTabId"
```

```vue
      </KeepAlive>
      <el-empty
        v-if="!tabsForRender.length"
        class="workspace-editor-empty"
        description="暂无打开的文档"

<style scoped>
.workspace-editor-layout {
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
  height: 100%;
  width: 100%;
}

.workspace-editor-content {
  position: relative;

```

`addDocumentTab` 内部更新 `tabs` 后，`WorkspaceTabs` 仍显示旧列表，是因为 `el-tabs` 接收到的 `tabs` 引用没有变化，导致视图没有重新渲染。当前 `tabs` 是一个 `reactive([])`，push 不会换引用；当 `WorkspaceTabs` 取到同一个数组引用时，Element Plus 的内部不会强制刷新。

解决办法：在 `Editor.vue` 里新增 `tabsForRender = computed(() => [...tabs])`，并在模板中改用 `tabsForRender` 传给 `WorkspaceTabs` 与 `WorkspaceTabPane`。这样每次 `tabs` 变化都会返回一个新的数组引用，`el-tabs` 会感知更新，标签栏能够立即显示新标签，而无需手动刷新页面。

---

**User**

能不能让WorkspaceTabs自己从Workspace获取数据，而不是从prop传？@WorkspaceTabs.vue @workspace.ts 

---

**Cursor**
